subcodes.first_line: O ye two candles of the love of God! Glorify ye the Lord that the effulgence of the Sun of Truth hath shone forth and become the cause of illumination [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شمع محبت الله حمد کنید خدا را که پرتو شمس حقیقت شامل شد و سبب روشناای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @light and darkness
